availableSlots: Available number of renewals within the subscription: <gradient>{{countAvailableListings}}</gradient>.
descriptionFreeListings: You can extend your listing yourself by clicking the “Extend” option. If the listing is inactive or less than 1 month remain before it expires, it will be automatically extended by 1 month, counted from today's date.

title: Company listing payments
tooltipFreeExtend: You can extend an active listing only when less than 1 month remain before it expires.
